Title: Sentô-ryoku 10-bai!! Bejîta dai henshin
Actors: Masako Nozawa, Mayumi Tanaka, Hiromi Tsuru
Plot: Vegeta uses his energy to create artificial moonlight and turns into Ôzaru, and Son Goku, after trying to fight him, realizes that his only chance for victory is to use the Genki Dama. Meanwhile, Son Gohan flies back to help his dad.
